Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x3000 "MADBALLS-2C00-3000" -Di_irq_exit=0 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 lda #$35 sta $01 jsr $2c00 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Madballs.prg"
Metadata.Notes: Added an init routine at $2C00 which copies 768 bytes of data from $2C30 down to $0100 so that the dump can start at $0400. It then jumps to the entry point at $3000 (it couldn't use RTS because of the copy overwriting the boot code).
